prompt: Plot the 30-day price history of the YES token for the Polymarket market 'Will Bitcoin hit $150k by June 30, 2026?' (currently ~1.35% YES) and call out the largest single-day move in implied probability — this market did $5.8M in 24h volume so the path matters.
expectedReason: time-series chart needs enough history to show shape
responsePreview:
Based on the data retrieved, the current implied probability for Bitcoin hitting $150,000 by June 30, 2026, is **2.1%** (trading at $0.0205). 

While a chart was generated showing the recent price action, it only reflects a very narrow window of time on May 2, 2026. The 30-day price history and the specific "largest single-day move" could not be fully determined because the data retrieval process was bounded and did not return the full historical range requested.

### Current Market Data
As of **May 2, 2026, 05:15 UTC**, the outcomes for the "When will Bitcoin hit $150k?" event are:

| Outcome | Price (USD) | Implied Probability | 24h Volume |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **by June 30, 2026** (YES) | $0.0205 | 2.1% | $15,734,008.01 |
| **by December 31, 2026** | $0.1050 | 10.5% | $291,903.31 |

### Historical Insights
The emitted chart shows the YES token price remained flat at **0.0205** between 05:00 UTC and 05:15 UTC on May 2, 2026. Because only these recent data points were available in the tool results:
*   **Largest single-day move:** Not available in this dataset.
*   **30-day trend:** Not available in this dataset.
